author: @benjaminn8
summary: sync --since now uses UTC RFC3339 and binds the resulting timestamp into the GraphQL query variable so updated_at filtering actually runs.
reason: Shopify GraphQL updated_at filtering requires the `query: $query` field arg on resource connections, with an RFC3339 UTC timestamp. The generated sync.go formats --since via .Format(time.RFC3339) on a local time.Time (which Shopify parses as UTC, producing a wrong-window cursor) and never binds sinceTS into the variables map at all (so even a correct timestamp does nothing). Fix applies .UTC() before .Format and adds the variables["query"] = "updated_at:>=" + sinceTS bind for every resource except fulfillment-orders, whose schema has no query arg. Generator template bug; cli-printing-press#2056 covers the UTC half; the dead-bind half is a related defect surfaced in this reprint.
validated_outcome: shopify-pp-cli sync orders --since 7d returns only orders updated in the last 7 days against a live Shopify store, not the full table.
